testcase.name: floating assistant opens and answers a cached example
assistant handles an operating bank by name (Comerica), not a failure dump
bank report page renders for an institution
DE section "Live Pipeline" renders its content
DE section "Data Quality" renders its content
DE section "Source Contracts" renders its content
DE section "Engineering Stack" renders its content
DE section "Architecture Decisions" renders its content
AI section "AI Pipeline" renders its content
AI section "Feature Contracts" renders its content
AI section "AI Stack" renders its content
AI section "Model Quality" renders its content
AI section "Model Decisions" renders its content
Early Warning what-if: moving a lever changes the probability
chat: typo resolves (fifth thord -> Fifth Third)
chat: operating bank reads as operating
chat: failed bank reads as failed (not safe)
chat: nonsense does not crash and gives a response
bank report: failed bank shows the failed-but-low reconciliation
wiki: article renders real content
chat -> open full report navigates to the report for that bank
home surface renders the brand and entry
data engineering surface renders the live pipeline
data engineering Data Quality shows the GX suite result
AI surface renders the model pipeline flow
AI Model Quality shows the headline metrics and robustness cross-checks
AI Decisions surface exposes the methodology write-ups
floating assistant launcher is present on a content page
early warning surface renders
